text: Trump calls Justin Trudeau the "prime minister" of Canada after a long break.
text_zh: 特朗普在长时间中断后称贾斯廷·特鲁多为加拿大的“总理”。

text: 🔄 Forwarded from DD Geopolitics: 🇺🇸 When you're tired of winning 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 DD Geopolitics：🇺🇸 当你厌倦了获胜 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧U.S. President Trump believes that a peace deal between Israel and Lebanon this year is possible. Reporter: "Peace between Lebanon and Israel. Do you think it will happen this year?" Trump: "I think it is a great chance. I mean, you know, they're…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 U.S. President Trump on if Hezbollah doesn't respect the ceasefire: "Well, look, Israel has to I mean, we're just talking about it. Israel is gonna have to defend itself if they're shot at, and, they will. I I would never say that they can't. It would be nice if they wouldn't have to bother with that. But, if they if something happens, they're gonna have to defend themselves, as you know. But they're gonna do it carefully, and they're gonna be, surgical as opposed to beyond surgical. And, you know, there's a lot they can do." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧美国总统特朗普认为今年以色列和黎巴嫩之间达成和平协议是有可能的。记者：“黎巴嫩和以色列之间的和平。你认为今年会实现吗？”特朗普：“我认为机会很大。我的意思是，你知道，他们……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 美国总统特朗普谈到如果真主党不遵守停火协议时说：“嗯，听着，以色列必须……我的意思是，我们只是在谈论它。如果以色列受到攻击，他们将不得不进行自卫，而且他们会的。我永远不会说他们不能。如果他们不必为此烦恼那就太好了。但是，如果发生了什么事，如你所知，他们将不得不进行自卫。但他们会小心行事，他们会进行外科手术式的打击，而不是超越外科手术式的。而且，你知道，他们能做的事情很多。” @wfwitness

text: Trump: I haven't invited Putin to the G20, but if he came, it would probably be very helpful.
text_zh: 特朗普：我没有邀请普京参加G20，但如果他来了，那可能会非常有帮助。

text: Reporter: Are you angry at China for them sending stuff to Iran? Trump: No, we do the same thing, don't we, with other countries?
text_zh: 记者：你是否因为中国向伊朗运送物资而对中国感到愤怒？特朗普：不，我们对其他国家不也做同样的事情吗？

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧U.S. Ambassador to Israel Huckabee described Hezbollah as a bad little kid throwing rocks at people's window. "The people of Lebanon and the people of Israel are neighbors, and they wanna get along. They can get along. But it's like neighbors who…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 U.S. President Trump believes that a peace deal between Israel and Lebanon this year is possible. Reporter: "Peace between Lebanon and Israel. Do you think it will happen this year?" Trump: "I think it is a great chance. I mean, you know, they're they're friends about the same things, and they're enemies on the same things. And it has to do with, I guess, could say a couple of countries, but certainly it's, if you look at Hezbollah, that's where everybody seems to be united against them. So, they are both very united in that way." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧美国驻以色列大使赫卡比将真主党描述为一个向人们窗户扔石头的坏小孩。“黎巴嫩人民和以色列人民是邻居，他们想要和睦相处。他们可以和睦相处。但这就像邻居……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 美国总统特朗普认为今年以色列和黎巴嫩之间达成和平协议是有可能的。记者：“黎巴嫩和以色列之间的和平。你认为今年会实现吗？”特朗普：“我认为机会很大。我的意思是，你知道，他们在某些事情上是朋友，在某些事情上是敌人。这与，我想，可以说是一两个国家有关，但可以肯定的是，如果你看看真主党，那是每个人似乎都团结一致反对他们的地方。所以，他们在这一点上非常团结。” @wfwitness

text: Reporter: It is a crime to speak with Israel in Lebanon. Trump: How is it a crime? Reporter: It is a crime according to the Lebanese law. Trump: We have to end that, we will end that.
text_zh: 记者：在黎巴嫩与以色列对话是犯罪行为。特朗普：怎么会是犯罪呢？记者：根据黎巴嫩法律，这是犯罪。特朗普：我们必须结束这种情况，我们会结束它的。

text: Trump: The whole world, unfortunately, has become somewhat of a casino. I am not happy with any of that stuff.
text_zh: 特朗普：不幸的是，整个世界已经变成了一个赌场。我对所有这些事情都不满意。

text: Reporter: Must Iran stop funding Hezbollah to get a deal from you? Trump: Yes, that is a must.
text_zh: 记者：伊朗必须停止资助真主党才能从你那里获得协议吗？特朗普：是的，这是必须的。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 U.S. Ambassador to Israel Huckabee described Hezbollah as a bad little kid throwing rocks at people's window. "The people of Lebanon and the people of Israel are neighbors, and they wanna get along. They can get along. But it's like neighbors who have a rough little kid living in the neighborhood who keeps throwing rocks at everybody's window. And if the kid will quit throwing rocks, the neighbors can get along and start actually working together. The president has initiated something that is truly bringing the neighborhood back to a neighborhood and recognizing that the problem is not Lebanon, that the problem is not Israel, the problem is Hezbollah, the bad little kid throwing rocks." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 美国驻以色列大使赫卡比将真主党描述为一个向人们窗户扔石头的坏小孩。“黎巴嫩人民和以色列人民是邻居，他们想要和睦相处。他们可以和睦相处。但这就像邻居们住在一个社区里，有一个顽劣的小孩不断向每个人的窗户扔石头。如果这个孩子停止扔石头，邻居们就能和睦相处，并开始真正地合作。总统发起了一些真正让社区回归社区的事情，并认识到问题不在于黎巴嫩，问题不在于以色列，问题在于真主党，那个扔石头的坏小孩。” @wfwitness

text: Trump: Israel is gonna have to defend itself if they are shot at, and they will, I will never say that they can't. They are going to do it carefully and surgical.
text_zh: 特朗普：如果以色列受到攻击，他们将不得不进行自卫，而且他们会的，我永远不会说他们不能。他们会小心谨慎地进行外科手术式的打击。

text: U.S. Ambassador to Israel Mike Huckabee: The problem is not Lebanon, the problem is not Israel, the problem is Hezbollah, the bad little kid throwing rocks.
text_zh: 美国驻以色列大使迈克·赫卡比：问题不在黎巴嫩，也不在以色列，问题在于真主党，那个乱扔石头的坏小孩。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 ABC : U.S. Federal authorities have arrested a U.S. special forces soldier who was involved in the capture of Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro for allegedly betting more than $33,000 on Polymarket hours before the operation was announced, netting over $400,000 in profit. The Justice Department is prosecuting what is believed to be the first insider trading case on a prediction market. Separately, another Polymarket user made roughly $550,000 on bets related to U.S. strikes on Iran and the removal of the Ayatollah. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 美国广播公司（ABC）：美国联邦当局逮捕了一名美国特种部队士兵，他曾参与抓捕委内瑞拉总统尼古拉斯·马杜罗。据称，他在行动宣布前几小时在Polymarket上押注超过33,000美元，获利超过400,000美元。司法部正在起诉这起被认为是预测市场上首例内幕交易的案件。另外，另一名Polymarket用户在与美国打击伊朗及罢免阿亚图拉相关的赌注中获利约550,000美元。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump intends to invite Russian President Vladimir Putin to the G20 summit in Miami, officials told The Washington Post. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047428148954861931/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：据《华盛顿邮报》报道，官员们称，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普打算邀请俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京参加在迈阿密举行的G20峰会。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047428148954861931/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Comparing the war in Iran to Vietnam isn't exactly reassuring. Reporter: How long are you willing to wait for a response from Iran? Trump: Don’t rush me. We were in Vietnam for 18 years. https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2047406337185947780/video/1 - Acyn tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：将伊朗战争与越南战争相提并论并不令人感到宽慰。记者：你愿意等伊朗的回应等多久？特朗普：别催我。我们在越南待了18年。 https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2047406337185947780/video/1 - Acyn 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump: "The President of the United States, DONALD J. TRUMP, Vice President of the United States, JD Vance, Secretary of State, Marco Rubio, Ambassador to Israel, Mike Huckabee, and Ambassador to Lebanon, Michel Issa, met today with High Ranking Representatives of Israel and Lebanon in the Oval Office. The Meeting went very well! The United States is going to work with Lebanon in order to help it protect itself from Hezbollah. The Ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon will be extended by THREE WEEKS. I look forward in the near future to hosting the Prime Minister of Israel, Bibi Netanyahu, and the President of Lebanon, Joseph Aoun. It was a Great Honor to be a participant at this very Historic Meeting! President DONALD J. TRUMP." JUST IN 🔴 TRUMP: CEASEFIRE BETWEEN ISRAEL AND LEBANON WILL BE EXTENDED BY THREE WEEKS. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普、美国副总统JD·万斯、国务卿马可·卢比奥、驻以色列大使迈克·赫卡比和驻黎巴嫩大使米歇尔·伊萨今天在椭圆形办公室会见了以色列和黎巴嫩的高级代表。会议进行得非常顺利！美国将与黎巴嫩合作，帮助其保护自己免受真主党的侵害。以色列和黎巴嫩之间的停火协议将延长三周。我期待在不久的将来接待以色列总理比比·内塔尼亚胡和黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩。能参加这次非常具有历史意义的会议是我的荣幸！总统唐纳德·J·特朗普。” 最新消息 🔴 特朗普：以色列和黎巴嫩之间的停火协议将延长三周。 - 开源情报推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Trump says the ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon will be extended by three weeks. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2047426820505587965/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv：最新消息 - 特朗普表示，以色列和黎巴嫩之间的停火协议将延长三周。 https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2047426820505587965/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 TRUMP: CEASEFIRE BETWEEN ISRAEL AND LEBANON WILL BE EXTENDED BY THREE WEEKS. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：最新消息 🔴 特朗普：以色列和黎巴嫩之间的停火协议将延长三周。 推文

text: WarTranslated Ukrainian special services disrupted a contract-signing event for the "Special Military Operation" among students at the Kuban State Agrarian University. A Ukrainian soldier warned potential recruits about exactly what awaits them if they come to Ukraine. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2047425939311656961/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：乌克兰特种部队扰乱了库班国立农业大学学生为“特别军事行动”举行的签约活动。一名乌克兰士兵警告潜在的新兵，如果他们来到乌克兰，等待他们的将是什么。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2047425939311656961/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to AFP News Agency, citing sources with knowledge on the matter, Russia will be invited to the next G20 summit in Miami, Florida. The next G20 summit will be in December of this year. Context: It’s important to note that Russia has not been expelled or disinvited from the G20 but has instead been the recipient of significant high level pressure to limit its participation since the ongoing Russo-Ukrainian War began. Since 2019, Russian President Vladimir Putin has not attended the summit, choosing to send subordinate decision-makers, like Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov, instead. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：据法新社援引知情人士的消息称，俄罗斯将受邀参加在佛罗里达州迈阿密举行的下一届G20峰会。下一届G20峰会将于今年12月举行。背景：需要注意的是，俄罗斯并未被驱逐或取消G20邀请，但自俄乌战争爆发以来，俄罗斯一直承受着巨大的高层压力以限制其参与。自2019年以来，俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京一直没有出席峰会，而是选择派遣下属决策者，如俄罗斯外交部长谢尔盖·拉夫罗夫出席。 推文

text: WarMonitor U.S. intelligence has said there was no imminent nuclear threat from Iran, and even if there were, nothing done so far in this war would have eliminated it. In fact, some experts say the risk may be higher now than it was before. Asked about how people should expect gas prices to remain high, President Trump says, "For a little while. You know what they get for that? Iran without a nuclear weapon." - Kaitlan Collins tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：美国情报部门表示，伊朗没有迫在眉睫的核威胁，即使有，这场战争中迄今为止所做的一切也无法消除它。事实上，一些专家表示，现在的风险可能比以前更高。当被问及人们应该如何预期汽油价格保持高位时，特朗普总统说：“会持续一段时间。你知道他们为此得到了什么吗？一个没有核武器的伊朗。” - 凯特兰·柯林斯（Kaitlan Collins）推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) REPORTER: What do you say to the American people who question how much longer this will take... US PRESIDENT TRUMP: You're such a disgrace. Did you hear what I just said? Vietnam. How many years was Vietnam? https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2047423272766030231/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻)：记者：对于那些质疑这还需要多久的美国人民，你想说什么…… 美国总统特朗普：你真是个耻辱。你听到我刚才说的话了吗？越南。越南持续了多少年？ https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2047423272766030231/video/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @JakubKrupa : The power of a viral moment: Macron's 'for sure' follows him literally everywhere. Cyprus with us, for sure. ✅ https://twitter.com/EmmanuelMacron/status/2047316946136261112/video/1 - Emmanuel Macron tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix：转发 @JakubKrupa：病毒式时刻的力量：马克龙的“当然”（for sure）真的随处可见。塞浦路斯与我们同在，当然。 ✅ https://twitter.com/EmmanuelMacron/status/2047316946136261112/video/1 - 埃马纽埃尔·马克龙推文

text: Open Source Intel WATCH IDF: Three Hezbollah terrorists eliminated after firing a ground-to-air missile at an IAF aircraft. The missile missed. In a separate incident, terrorists launched an explosive drone at IDF forces in southern Lebanon. The IDF struck terror infrastructure in the area. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047422296202051815/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：观看 以色列国防军（IDF）：三名真主党恐怖分子在向以色列空军飞机发射地对空导弹后被消灭。导弹未击中。在另一起事件中，恐怖分子向黎巴嫩南部的以色列国防军部队发射了一架爆炸无人机。以色列国防军打击了该地区的恐怖基础设施。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047422296202051815/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel CNN: The U.S. military is preparing strategies to strike Iran's Strait of Hormuz defense systems if the truce collapses. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：CNN：如果停火协议破裂，美军正在制定打击伊朗霍尔木兹海峡防御系统的战略。 推文

text: ELINT News RT @alexbward : The U.S. has fired more than 1,000 long-range Tomahawk missiles since the war with Iran began on Feb. 28, as well as 1,500 to 2,000 critical air-defense missiles, including Thaad, Patriot and Standard Missile interceptors, according to U.S. officials tweet
text_zh: ELINT News：转发 @alexbward：据美国官员称，自2月28日与伊朗的战争开始以来，美国已经发射了超过1,000枚远程战斧导弹，以及1,500到2,000枚关键的防空导弹，包括萨德（Thaad）、爱国者（Patriot）和标准导弹（Standard Missile）拦截弹。 推文

text: ELINT News RT @alexbward : NEW: The U.S. has burned through so many munitions in Iran that some administration officials increasingly assess that America couldn’t fully execute contingency plans to defend Taiwan from a Chinese invasion if it occurred in the near term, U.S. officials said. tweet
text_zh: ELINT News：转发 @alexbward：最新消息：美国在伊朗消耗了如此多的弹药，以至于一些政府官员越来越认为，如果中国在近期入侵台湾，美国将无法完全执行防御台湾的应急计划，美国官员说。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah claimed responsibility for rocket fire at Shtula in the Western Galilee, calling it a response to alleged Israeli ceasefire violations and an Israeli strike on Yatar in the Nabatiya district. Sirens sounded in Shtula. Home Front Command said the incident ended at 23:29 local time. Hezbollah warned that if the current ceasefire is not renewed by Sunday, it will resume strikes deeper inside Israel. Earlier today, the IDF said it intercepted a Hezbollah hostile aircraft launched toward Israeli troops operating south of the Forward Defense Line in southern Lebanon. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：真主党声称对西加利利什图拉（Shtula）的火箭弹袭击负责，称这是对所谓以色列违反停火协议以及以色列对纳巴提耶区亚塔尔（Yatar）进行打击的回应。什图拉响起了警报。后方司令部表示，事件于当地时间23:29结束。真主党警告称，如果目前的停火协议不在周日之前续签，它将恢复对以色列更深处的打击。今天早些时候，以色列国防军表示，拦截了一架真主党敌机，该飞机是向在黎巴嫩南部前沿防御线以南行动的以色列军队发射的。 推文

text: BREAKING: Trump: The Ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon will be extended by THREE WEEKS.
text_zh: 突发：特朗普：以色列与黎巴嫩之间的停火协议将延长三周。

text: WarFront Witness pinned a photo
text_zh: WarFront Witness 置顶了一张照片

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧 U.S. President Trump says Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extended by 3 weeks: The President of the United States, DONALD J. TRUMP, Vice President of the United States, JD Vance, Secretary of State, Marco Rubio, Ambassador to Israel, Mike Huckabee, and…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 NewsNation: U.S. Secretary of State Rubio reports that U.S. President Trump wanted to be personally involved in the discussion between Israel and Lebanon today. Rubio is glad that he was as he was able to secure the ceasefire extension. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧 美国总统特朗普表示以色列与黎巴嫩停火协议延长3周：美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普、美国副总统万斯、国务卿马尔科·卢比奥、驻以色列大使迈克·赫卡比，以及……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 NewsNation：美国国务卿卢比奥报告称，美国总统特朗普希望亲自参与今天以色列与黎巴嫩之间的讨论。卢比奥很高兴他参与了，因为他成功确保了停火协议的延长。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 WaPo : U.S. President Trump intends to invite Russian President Vladimir Putin to the G‑20 leaders’ summit scheduled for December at Trump’s Doral golf resort in Miami. Russia has not been invited yet, but a senior official said Russia is a G‑20 member and will be invited. Kremlin spokesman Dmitry Peskov said Russia has participated in every summit at the appropriate level, and a decision on the format of participation will be made closer to the summit. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 《华盛顿邮报》：美国总统特朗普打算邀请俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京参加定于12月在特朗普位于迈阿密的多拉尔高尔夫度假村举行的G20领导人峰会。俄罗斯尚未收到邀请，但一位高级官员表示，俄罗斯是G20成员国，将会受到邀请。克里姆林宫发言人德米特里·佩斯科夫表示，俄罗斯以适当级别参加了历次峰会，关于参与形式的决定将在临近峰会时做出。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 U.S. President Trump says Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extended by 3 weeks: The President of the United States, DONALD J. TRUMP, Vice President of the United States, JD Vance, Secretary of State, Marco Rubio, Ambassador to Israel, Mike Huckabee, and Ambassador to Lebanon, Michel Issa, met today with High Ranking Representatives of Israel and Lebanon in the Oval Office. The Meeting went very well! The United States is going to work with Lebanon in order to help it protect itself from Hezbollah. The Ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon will be extended by THREE WEEKS. I look forward in the near future to hosting the Prime Minister of Israel, Bibi Netanyahu, and the President of Lebanon, Joseph Aoun. It was a Great Honor to be a participant at this very Historic Meeting! President DONALD J. TRUMP @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 美国总统特朗普表示以色列与黎巴嫩停火协议延长3周：美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普、美国副总统万斯、国务卿马尔科·卢比奥、驻以色列大使迈克·赫卡比以及驻黎巴嫩大使米歇尔·伊萨今天在椭圆形办公室会见了以色列和黎巴嫩的高级代表。会议进行得非常顺利！美国将与黎巴嫩合作，以帮助其保护自己免受真主党的侵害。以色列与黎巴嫩之间的停火协议将延长三周。我期待在不久的将来接待以色列总理比比·内塔尼亚胡和黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩。能参加这次非常具有历史意义的会议是我的莫大荣幸！总统唐纳德·J·特朗普 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇦🇭🇺Ukrainian President Zelenskyy on Hungarian Prime Minister Orban losing his reelection: Reporter: "How do you feel that Orban is out now from the picture?" Zelenskyy: "No. I'm I'm, you know, it's it's not the question of personalities. I always said…" ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇪🇺 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 Ukrainian President Zelenskyy explains why the EU's 20th sanctions package came at a critical time. "You see that a lot of changes in the world. Sometimes some sanctions from Russia lifted, been lifted by The United States because of energy crisis and etcetera. So it was very important for Europe to continue with the sanctions packages with the 20s and immediately say that we all will work on twenty first package." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇦🇭🇺 乌克兰总统泽连斯基谈及匈牙利总理欧尔班竞选连任失败：记者：“你对欧尔班现在出局有什么感觉？”泽连斯基：“不。我，你知道，这不是关于个人的问题。我总是说……” ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇪🇺 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 乌克兰总统泽连斯基解释了为什么欧盟的第20轮制裁方案在关键时刻出台。“你看到世界上发生了很多变化。有时美国因为能源危机等原因取消了对俄罗斯的一些制裁。因此，欧洲继续实施第20轮制裁方案并立即表示我们将共同致力于第21轮方案非常重要。” @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Israeli Radio and Television Organization: Israel has sent a message to the United States expressing its green light to resume the war against Iran. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 以色列广播电视组织：以色列已向美国传达信息，表示同意重启对伊朗的战争。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇦🇪🇺 Ukrainian President Zelenskyy on if it's realistic for Ukraine to join the EU next year: Reporter: "Is realistic to join the EU next year for you?" Zelenskyy: "We want very much. I always share that it doesn't depend on the decision of Ukrainian Ukrainian…" ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇭🇺 Ukrainian President Zelenskyy on Hungarian Prime Minister Orban losing his reelection: Reporter: "How do you feel that Orban is out now from the picture?" Zelenskyy: "No. I'm I'm, you know, it's it's not the question of personalities. I always said that we are neighbors, Ukraine and Hungary. And I think that our people need to have strong, warm, good relations. It's not only about, you know, strategic relations. You are neighbors. You have to live in peace." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇦🇪🇺 乌克兰总统泽连斯基谈及乌克兰明年加入欧盟是否现实：记者：‘对您来说，明年加入欧盟现实吗？’ 泽连斯基：‘我们非常想。我总是说，这不取决于乌克兰人民的决定……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇭🇺 乌克兰总统泽连斯基谈及匈牙利总理欧尔班竞选连任失败：记者：‘欧尔班现在出局了，您感觉如何？’ 泽连斯基：‘不。我，你知道，这不是个人问题。我一直说我们是邻居，乌克兰和匈牙利。我认为我们的人民需要建立强大、温暖、良好的关系。这不仅仅是关于战略关系。你们是邻居。你们必须和平共处。’” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇦🇪🇺🇺🇸🇮🇷Ukrainian President Zelenskyy explains why Ukraine needs independent missile capacities. "Only to create the system, to create such capabilities which can produce more. Now, you know that United States, produces about 60, maybe 65 missiles per…" ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇪🇺 Ukrainian President Zelenskyy on if it's realistic for Ukraine to join the EU next year: Reporter: "Is realistic to join the EU next year for you?" Zelenskyy: "We want very much. I always share that it doesn't depend on the decision of Ukrainian Ukrainian people. We already decided we want to be as quick as possible in EU, and EU helps us during this war and helped and helps a lot. And we will share our knowledge and our experience now to strengthen Europe. Everybody is understanding that we have such unique experience." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇦🇪🇺🇺🇸🇮🇷 乌克兰总统泽连斯基解释为何乌克兰需要独立的导弹能力。‘只是为了建立系统，建立能够生产更多的能力。现在，你知道美国每月生产大约60，也许65枚导弹，PAC-3反弹道导弹。这不算什么。在中东遭受攻击的第一天，你知道，他们在24小时内就消耗了这种导弹两年的产量。所以我们需要我们欧洲独立强大的系统，我们将建立它。’ ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇪🇺 乌克兰总统泽连斯基谈及乌克兰明年加入欧盟是否现实：记者：‘对您来说，明年加入欧盟现实吗？’ 泽连斯基：‘我们非常想。我总是说，这不取决于乌克兰人民的决定。我们已经决定我们想尽快加入欧盟，欧盟在这场战争中帮助了我们，而且帮助很大。我们现在将分享我们的知识和经验来加强欧洲。每个人都明白我们有这样独特的经验。’” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF says it struck and killed three Hezbollah operatives who fired an anti-aircraft missile at an Israeli drone over southern Lebanon earlier today. (Footage attached) According to the military, the attempt to shoot down the drone was unsuccessful. In a separate incident, the IDF says Hezbollah attacked troops operating in southern Lebanon with an explosive drone. One reservist soldier was lightly injured in the incident. The IDF says it struck Hezbollah sites in the area in response. In another incident, Hezbollah fired several rockets at troops operating in the Aynata area, adjacent to Bint Jbeil. The IDF says that some of the rockets struck near the troops, but no injuries were caused. Additionally, the IDF says it struck and destroyed two Hezbollah rocket launchers in southern Lebanon today. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军表示，今天早些时候在黎巴嫩南部击毙了三名向以色列无人机发射防空导弹的真主党武装人员。（附视频）据军方称，击落无人机的企图未果。在另一起事件中，以色列国防军称真主党用爆炸无人机袭击了在黎巴嫩南部行动的部队。一名预备役士兵在事件中受轻伤。以色列国防军表示，作为回应，它打击了该地区的真主党据点。在另一起事件中，真主党向在宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）附近的艾纳塔（Aynata）地区行动的部队发射了几枚火箭弹。以色列国防军称，一些火箭弹落在部队附近，但未造成人员伤亡。此外，以色列国防军表示，今天在黎巴嫩南部打击并摧毁了两个真主党火箭发射器。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇪🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Ukrainian President Zelenskyy explains why Ukraine needs independent missile capacities. "Only to create the system, to create such capabilities which can produce more. Now, you know that United States, produces about 60, maybe 65 missiles per month, PAC-three anti ballistic missiles. It's nothing. During the first day of attack on Middle East, you know, that they used the volume of two years production of such missiles during twenty four hours. So we need our European independent strong system, and we will build it." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇪🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 乌克兰总统泽连斯基解释为何乌克兰需要独立的导弹能力。‘只是为了建立系统，建立能够生产更多的能力。现在，你知道美国每月生产大约60，也许65枚导弹，PAC-3反弹道导弹。这不算什么。在中东遭受攻击的第一天，你知道，他们在24小时内就消耗了这种导弹两年的产量。所以我们需要我们欧洲独立强大的系统，我们将建立它。’ @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to קבינט מדיני ביטחוני - מוריה אסרף & דורון קדוש: "רק מתחילת השבוע: 11 הפרות לפחות של הפסקת האש בידי חזבאללה. 6 מהן - רק היום (!). עד לשעה זו: מדינת ישראל לא מגיבה על ההפרות - למרות פציעתו של לוחם המילואים ולמרות שחזבאללה הגביר דרמטית את קצב הירי והחל לירות גם לשטח ישראל." Just amazing how if Israel doesn't nuke Lebanon, Israelis don't think Israel responded. They can't be equal Dozens of Lebanese have been killed since the ceasefire started, you attacked cars and shelled towns by artillery Its called a ceasefire. Learn to be normal people
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 政治安全内阁 - 莫里亚·阿萨夫（Moriah Asraf） & 多伦·卡多什（Doron Kadosh）：“仅从本周开始：真主党至少违反了11次停火协议。其中6次就在今天（！）。截至目前：以色列国对这些违规行为没有做出反应——尽管有预备役士兵受伤，尽管真主党大幅提高了射击频率，并开始向以色列境内开火。” 真令人惊叹，如果以色列不向黎巴嫩投掷核弹，以色列人就不认为以色列做出了回应。他们不能平等对待。自停火开始以来，已有数十名黎巴嫩人被杀，你们袭击了汽车并用火炮炮击城镇。这叫停火。学会做正常人吧。

text: WarMonitor Millions of Americans may now qualify for Canadian citizenship after a recent rule change, sparking a surge in applications as people explore dual citizenship for jobs, family ties, and politics. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047420252175389029/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 数百万美国人现在可能符合加拿大公民身份的条件，此前的一项规则变更引发了申请激增，人们正在探索双重国籍以寻求工作、家庭联系和政治机会。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047420252175389029/photo/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @vonderleyen : Poland is an essential pillar of Europe’s security architecture, I told @donaldtusk . You help keep our Eastern flank safe. This is why Poland is the biggest beneficiary of SAFE. Today we issued a loan agreement that would release €43 billion for defence projects that make our Union safer. Let’s move forward. tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix RT @vonderleyen：波兰是欧洲安全架构的重要支柱，我告诉了 @donaldtusk。你们帮助保障了我们东翼的安全。这就是为什么波兰是SAFE最大的受益者。今天我们签署了一项贷款协议，将释放430亿欧元用于使我们的联盟更安全的国防项目。让我们向前迈进。推文

text: Open Source Intel WSJ: The U.S. Navy has fired more than 1,000 Tomahawk cruise missiles into Iran since the war began. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047419916479877393/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel WSJ：自战争开始以来，美国海军已向伊朗发射了1000多枚战斧巡航导弹。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047419916479877393/photo/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index The US military 'burned through so many munitions in Iran' that some officials assess that the US 'couldn’t fully execute contingency plans to defend Taiwan from a Chinese invasion if it occurred in the near term', according to Wall Street Journal report. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2047419732614324697/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 据《华尔街日报》报道，美军在伊朗“消耗了如此多的弹药”，以至于一些官员评估认为，如果近期发生中国入侵台湾的情况，美国“将无法完全执行防御台湾的应急计划”。 https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2047419732614324697/photo/1 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz IDF strikes report in Lebanon moments ago Hezbollah says fired rockets at northern Israel - Michael A. Horowitz tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 以色列国防军刚刚报告在黎巴嫩进行打击，真主党称向以色列北部发射了火箭弹 - Michael A. Horowitz 推文
